body:
Hello Library lane team,

As part of our ongoing collaboration, please share any current issues you are facing and suggestions for how the group can help improve productivity across lanes.

Thank you.

_lane_worker.detail: Missing required field: schema_version; Missing required field: task_id; Missing required field: idempotency_key; Missing required field: subject; Missing required field: payload; Missing required field: execution; Missing required field: lease; Missing required field: retry; Missing required field: evidence; Field "type" value "inquiry" not in allowed values: task, response, heartbeat, escalation, handoff, ack, alert, notification, status
